description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular layout, surrounded by several tall palm trees. The structure features a combination of dark and light exterior wall panels, with large glass windows and sliding doors that open onto a spacious patio area. The front of the bungalow includes a covered entryway and a small porch, while the rear section appears to have an open terrace or deck. The landscaping is simple, with the palm trees providing a tropical ambiance and partial shade around the building. The bungalow is single-storied, with clean lines and a focus on open, airy spaces. The overall design emphasizes contemporary aesthetics and integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious patio, surrounded by tall palm trees and minimalist landscaping.
description_view_0: Side view showing the patio area, pool, and several palm trees lining the perimeter.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, covered porch, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the open terrace and more palm trees.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the patio, pool, and the back facade with large glass doors.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
